answer:
Alright, so when I think about computers twenty years from now, honestly, it’s pretty wild to imagine how far things could go. I mean, technology has already grown at such a crazy pace, right? In the future, I picture computers being way more intuitive and, like, almost blending seamlessly with our lives. For instance, I wouldn’t be surprised if we see computers that are controlled entirely by our thoughts or voice, no keyboards or screens necessary—just super smart interfaces.

On top of that, I think artificial intelligence will be off the charts. Computers might not just assist us; they could anticipate what we need before we even ask. Imagine waking up and your computer has already scheduled your day, prepped your breakfast, and handled your emails. It sounds futuristic, but with smart homes and wearables, we’re halfway there.

Another thing is portability. I’m guessing computers will be embedded in things like glasses or even clothing, making access truly hands-free. As for the impact, well, our daily routines will get a whole lot easier, maybe too easy! However, I do think privacy concerns will get bigger, so we’ll have to keep a close eye on that. All in all, life will definitely be different—hopefully in a good way!
title:
Discuss your ideas for computers in the future. 
How do you imagine computers will be different in 20 years? 
What new features or abilities might they have? 
How do you think these changes will affect our daily lives?
extData:
{"pronuncFile":"/20251027/ea0c7e02ec93418185d8f544b6d8de41.mp3","titleTranslate":"讨论一下你对未来计算机的看法。
你认为20年后的计算机会有怎样的不同？
它们可能会有什么新的功能或能力？
你认为这些变化会如何影响我们的日常生活？","answerTemplate":"开题陈述 
Begin with a general statement about the future of computers:  
"As technology continues to advance rapidly, it’s fascinating to imagine what computers might be like in [20 years/the future]."

正文 
未来的变化  
Introduce your ideas about how computers will change:  
"In my opinion, computers will be quite different from today in terms of [size/speed/intelligence/design]."  
Provide possible changes:  
"For example, they might become [smaller, more portable, or even wearable], and could operate much faster due to [advancements in hardware/software]."

新功能或能力
Discuss new functions or abilities:  
"I believe future computers will have features such as [artificial intelligence, voice recognition, or virtual reality capabilities]."  
Give an example:  
"For instance, they could [help us manage daily tasks automatically, translate languages instantly, or even predict our needs before we express them]."

对日常生活的影响 
Explain possible effects on our lives:  
"These changes will likely affect our lives in many ways. For one, we may become [more efficient/more dependent on technology]."  
Provide a specific impact:  
"For example, people could [work remotely more easily, access education globally, or enjoy improved healthcare services]."

总结  
Summarize your viewpoint:  
"In conclusion, I think computers will be much more advanced in 20 years, with many new features that will transform our routines."  
End with a final thought:  
"It will be important for us to adapt to these changes and use technology responsibly for the benefit of society.""}
